query:
-- For hot projects that were enriched but have 0 send_ready contacts,
-- what's the trust tier breakdown of their contacts?
SELECT 
  c.contactTrustTier,
  c.enrichmentStatus,
  c.enrichmentSource,
  c.email IS NOT NULL as has_email,
  COUNT(*) as contact_count
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT cp2.projectId 
    FROM contactProjects cp2 
    JOIN contacts c2 ON c2.id = cp2.contactId 
    WHERE c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  )
GROUP BY c.contactTrustTier, c.enrichmentStatus, c.enrichmentSource, has_email
ORDER BY contact_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- For hot projects that were enriched but have 0 send_ready contacts,
-- what's the trust tier breakdown of their contacts?
SELECT 
  c.contactTrustTier,
  c.enrichmentStatus,
  c.enrichmentSource,
  c.email IS NOT NULL as has_email,
  COUNT(*) as contact_count
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT cp2.projectId 
    FROM contactProjects cp2 
    JOIN contacts c2 ON c2.id = cp2.contactId 
    WHERE c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  )
GROUP BY c.contactTrustTier, c.enrichmentStatus, c.enrichmentSource, has_email
ORDER BY contact_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
